booker.description: The contact details of the person making the booking

internalBookingReference.description: A reference from the calling system for the booking

travellers.description: A list of details of the customers on this booking.  Note that the order is important, as this array is accessed with an index during booking

bookingReference.description: The booking reference from the called system for this booking

internalBookingReference.description: A reference from the calling system for the booking

remarks.description: Any remarks for this booking returned by the supplier

givenName.description: The given (or first) name of the booking contact

surname.description: The family name (or surname) name of the booking contact

telephone.description: The telephone numnber of the booking contact

title.description: The title of the booking contact

bookingReference.description: The booking reference from the called system for this booking

channel.description: The source channel of this item, from the Room=>Source field in search results

internalBookingReference.description: A reference from the calling system for this item

asOf.description: The date this policy line takes effect (before=false) or finishes (before=true)

before.description: Whether this line applies to BEFORE 'asOf' or after (including) 'asOf'

penalty.description: Value of the penalty as a dollar figure.  A full value = no refund. EITHER penalty OR penaltyPercent will be given.

penaltyPercent.description: Value of the penalty as a percntage.  A full value = no refund. EITHER penalty OR penaltyPercent will be given.

categories.description: The categories for this activity.  Channel specific.

channel.description: The channel from which this activity record originated

channelCode.description: The unique code of this activity within the channel from which it originated

code.description: The unique code of this property within the service

departurePoint.description: The departure point for this service

fromPerPerson.description: The from / introductory price per adult

lastUpdate.description: the date and time this record was last updated

localOperatorInformation.description: Extra information about the on the ground operator

productType.description: The general type of this activity

scheduleAndPricingInformation.description: General information about schedules and pricing

bookingQuestionAnswers.description: Answers to the questions specified by the Activity Option

channel.description: The source channel of this item

internalItemReference.description: A reference from the calling system for this item

supplyRate.description: The net rate.  Used to verify that the rate has not changed between the time of search, and booking

travellerIndex.description: The index into the array of travellers against this booking, to indicate which travellers are on/in this item (/room)

bookingItemReference.description: The booking reference from the called system for this item

bookingQuestionAnswers.description: Answers to the questions specified by the Activity Option

channel.description: The source channel of this item, from the Room=>Source field in search results

internalItemReference.description: A reference from the calling system for this item

itemRemark.description: Any remark returned by the booking system particularly for this item

itemStatus.description: The booking status of this iterm

travelerNum.description: If the question is 'perTraveller', then the traeller index

email.description: The email of the traveller. Currently only used for transfers.

telephone.description: The telephone numnber of the person.  Currently only used for transfers.

adultCount.description: The number of adults over (and including) the age of 18

childAges.description: The ages of the children (the number is given by the number of ages provided
